title: The Lalit Kala Akadami (Taking Over of Management) Act, 1997
full_text: The Lalit Kala Akadami (Taking Over of Management) Act, 1997 ललित कला अकादमी (प्रबंध-ग्रहण)अधिनियम, 1997 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199717 Act Number: 17 Enactment Date: 1997-03-25 Act Year: 1997 Short Title: The Lalit Kala Akadami (Taking Over of Management) Act, 1997 Hindi Title: ललित कला अकादमी (प्रबंध-ग्रहण)अधिनियम, 1997 Long Title: An Act to provide for the taking over of the management of the Lalit Kala Akadami for a limited period in the public interest and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto.
